name: 3rd Shot Pickleball - Evansville
description: Evansville's only indoor pickleball club offering play 365 days a year! At 3rd Shot Pickleball we are committed to creating a fun, inclusive community where players of all ages and skill levels can enjoy the game of pickleball. Come join us!
fees: Fee required — Open to the public, with Guest Play and Membership options available

name: Ascension St. Vincent YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Ascension St. Vincent YMCA in Evansville, IN! There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to water, restrooms, locker rooms, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Burdette Park
description: Burdette Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Evansville, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: CK Newsome Center
description: CK Newsome Center is a place to play pickleball in Evansville, IN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
open_play_schedule: We play on Tuesday nights, twice a month. Usually the first and second Tuesdays. All skill levels.

name: Evansville Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Evansville Tennis Center in Evansville, IN! There are 6 indoor hard, asphalt, clay, and concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and food.
fees: Fee required — Membership $30/month $300/annual. Court price $17/hour. Non member court price $10 guest pass fee

name: Scott Township Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Scott Township Pickleball in Evansville, IN! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: The Cathedral
description: Come play pickleball at The Cathedral in Evansville, IN! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: The Pickleball Pit
description: The Pickleball Pit is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Evansville, IN. There is 1 indoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms, water, locker rooms, food, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the court. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Wesselman Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Wesselman Pickleball Courts in Evansville, IN! There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.
